title: Literal Name
text: Literal Name Case-sensitive name for the operation for non-Uniface implementations. The literal name should be a maximum of 64 characters. All NLS characters are valid, but the first character must be a letter. Description Uniface maps the operation name to the literal name. For C implementations only, Uniface generates the default name ComponentName_OperationName to ensure that it is unique. Applies To Signature Operation Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
